title: Aluminium Foil Trays - 5 Pack Disposable Foil Containers (32cm x 20cm x 3cm) - Large Roasting Tin for Baking, Roasting, Cooking, Broiling, BBQ and Food Storage - Foil Baking Trays for Oven
features: 🍗【 RELIABLE FOIL TRAY 】 You can enjoy hosting parties using our sturdy tin foil trays. These foil trays for baking are sterile and safe for food storing and baking. The high thermal conductivity property of this foil containers helps distributing the heat for a perfectly baked dish that your friends and loved ones will surely enjoy!

🍴【 LARGE BAKING TRAY 】 Our large disposable aluminium foil trays come in a 5 pack with a 32cm x 20cm x 3.3cm dimension each. This tray bake tin is oven safe and can withstand temperatures up to 260°C. Ideal for your baked Steak and Ale Pie or your favorite Beef, Chicken, Lamb or Pork Roast paired with roast potatoes and Yorkshire pudding! These foil turkey roasting trays extra large allow you to enjoy meal time with the whole family.

🥩【 VERSATILE FOOD TRAYS 】 Fall in love with our disposable baking trays, as we offer a variety of uses. From baking your favorite pies and roasts to easy serving of your lovely home-cooked meals, you can bring them to a cookout, picnic, or potluck! This aluminium baking tray set can also serve as catering trays or foil trays for party food during big gatherings. Worry less about leftsovers as you can also use our aluminium foil trays as storage trays.

🎂【 REUSABLE AND RECYCLABLE 】 Our disposable food trays for oven stand out as a sustainable choice. Unlike plastic containers, they lack harmful chemicals. These foil baking trays protect your food better and keep it at a higher temperature for longer. It's easy to store leftovers in the fridge, and you can just pop them right into the oven to reheat. Once you're done with them, they can be recycled and utilized to make a wide variety of finished items, including automobiles!

🍞【 WARRANTY 】 At ebake, your happiness is our priority. Every purchase of our roasting tray comes with a 100% warranty. Should you encounter any concerns or issues with your cooking trays, don't hesitate to reach out to us. Your peace of mind is our promise!
description: Product Description Previous page Made from premium aluminium foil For superior heat conductivity and even cooking. Great for everyday cooking As well as special occasions like parties, picnics, and family gatherings. Ideal for baking, roasting, cooking, broiling, BBQ And food storage, these trays meet all your culinary demands. FREEZER SAFE Ideal for preparing meals in advance and storing them in the freezer for later use. CONVENIENT STORAGE Stackable design saves space in your kitchen when storing unused trays.
